auth.loginDescription: Sign in to your Farm2Vets account
auth.signupDescription: Join Farm2Vets and manage your farm smarter
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
auth.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use 6+ characters
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

dashboard.backendEmpty: Backend is empty. Displaying mock data.

navigation.title: Navigation rail
navigation.description: Use this side navigation to move between the main Farm2Vets pages, including the dashboard, disease map, notebook, livestock, reports, and support tools.

overview.title: Farm overview
overview.description: This top section gives you the fastest snapshot of herd health, treatment demand, livestock count, and active consult load.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Use these shortcuts to capture observations quickly, analyze farm images, or request urgent support without leaving the dashboard.

sensors.title: Live barn sensors
sensors.description: This card shows the newest temperature, humidity, ammonia, and 24-hour averages so you can catch environmental stress early.

alerts.title: Disease risk alerts
alerts.description: This panel summarizes regional disease pressure and helps you decide when to investigate further or restrict livestock movement.

notifications.title: Urgent notifications
notifications.description: Review incoming alarms here. New warnings surface at the top so you can respond quickly when conditions change.

activity.title: Trends and recent activity
activity.description: Track herd growth beside the latest farm events to understand what changed and whether your interventions are working.

diseaseMapNavigation.title: Disease map page
diseaseMapNavigation.description: This menu item opens Disease Spread & Farm Map, where you can compare public outbreak intelligence with live conditions on your farm.

diseaseMapIntro.title: Disease map overview
diseaseMapIntro.description: This header explains the purpose of the page: combine regional disease movement with your own farm conditions in one view.

diseaseMapSpread.title: Disease spread intelligence
diseaseMapSpread.description: This section helps you scan outbreak zones, switch regions, and read public bulletins so you can spot pressure building before it reaches your barns.

diseaseMapFarm.title: Farm map and sensor layout
diseaseMapFarm.description: This farm map turns recent barn sensor data into an at-a-glance layout, making it easier to see where temperature and humidity conditions need attention.

notebookNavigation.title: AI Herd Notebook page
notebookNavigation.description: Open the notebook from here when you need to record field observations, analyze symptoms, or generate follow-up learning from critical notes.

notebookIntro.title: Notebook overview
notebookIntro.description: This page is where farm observations become a structured health record for the herd.

notebookAddNote.title: Add and analyze notes
notebookAddNote.description: Write a field note here, then either save it directly or ask AI to summarize urgency, tags, and next steps.

notebookHistory.title: Notebook history and quizzes
notebookHistory.description: Review saved notes, AI findings, recommendations, and generated quiz follow-ups for important herd health events.

forumNavigation.title: Community Forum page
forumNavigation.description: Use the forum to compare local farm reports, ask questions, and follow what nearby farmers are searching for.

forumComposer.title: Share a community update
forumComposer.description: Create a post here when you want to report a field observation, ask for advice, or share a useful farm experience.

forumRegionalSearch.title: Regional search trends
forumRegionalSearch.description: This panel suggests demo regional topics, helping farmers quickly search high-interest disease and livestock issues.

forumFeed.title: Forum feed
forumFeed.description: Browse posts, search results, and community activity here to see what farmers are discussing right now.

inventoryNavigation.title: Inventory & Supplies page
inventoryNavigation.description: Open inventory when you need to check feed, medicine, equipment, low stock, and supply movements.

inventoryOverview.title: Inventory overview
inventoryOverview.description: These cards summarize total items, inventory value, low-stock pressure, and the categories currently tracked.

inventoryStock.title: Stock and item controls
inventoryStock.description: Use this area to move between overview, item lists, and transaction records while checking supply status.

inventoryTransactions.title: Add items and transactions
inventoryTransactions.description: Use this action area to add supplies, then track incoming or outgoing inventory from the transaction view.

reportsNavigation.title: Reports & Analytics page
reportsNavigation.description: Open reports to review revenue, costs, production efficiency, and AI-generated business recommendations.

reportsOverview.title: Analytics overview
reportsOverview.description: These metrics summarize revenue, cost, profit, margin, and production efficiency for the selected period.

reportsCharts.title: Charts and breakdowns
reportsCharts.description: Use these charts to compare trends, revenue sources, cost categories, and farm performance over time.

reportsRecommendations.title: Recommendations tab
reportsRecommendations.description: Switch to Recommendations when you want AI-generated guidance based on the current farm financial report.

vetConnectNavigation.title: Open Veterinary Connect
vetConnectNavigation.description: Use Veterinary Connect when reports, alerts, or notebook findings need expert review from a veterinarian.

vetConnectRequest.title: Start a consult request
vetConnectRequest.description: Choose the animal type, urgency, and symptoms so the request has enough context for quick triage.

vetConnectAvailability.title: Review vet availability
vetConnectAvailability.description: Check which veterinarians are available, their status, region, and expected response time before following up.

vetConnectQueue.title: Track recent consults
vetConnectQueue.description: Use this queue area to understand how farm questions can be followed from request to veterinary response.

dashboard.lowDescription: No significant disease activity in your region.
dashboard.mediumDescription: HFMD and respiratory infections reported in nearby districts.
dashboard.highDescription: Multiple disease outbreaks confirmed. Restrict livestock movement.
dashboard.criticalDescription: Outbreak emergency. Contact vet immediately and isolate herd.
dashboard.diseaseMapPageTitle: Disease spread across Vietnam and live conditions on your farm
dashboard.diseaseMapPageSubtitle: Track public animal-disease signals at national and city scale, then compare them with the latest barn temperature and humidity values already flowing into your dashboard.
dashboard.diseaseSpreadIntro: This layer blends public outbreak bulletins with practical surveillance zones so farmers can quickly see where pressure is rising across Vietnam, Hanoi, and Saigon / Ho Chi Minh City.
dashboard.diseaseSpreadDisclaimer: This map is an operational awareness layer built from public reports and surveillance context. It helps farmers spot movement pressure and outbreak clusters, but it is not an official case-count dashboard from the government.
dashboard.citySurveillanceZones: City-level watch areas for faster local scanning
dashboard.outbreakAndSurveillanceBlend: Outbreak points plus movement and market surveillance
dashboard.geolocationUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
dashboard.connectionError: Cannot connect to server. Please check Backend.
dashboard.noDataAvailable: No data available. Please check Backend.
dashboard.farmSensorLayoutSubtitle: Each monitored barn is drawn as a building on the farm map and filled with the latest live temperature and humidity values from your existing sensor pipeline.
dashboard.farmLayoutReferenceAlt: Public-domain dairy farm layout used as the farm sensor map base
dashboard.farmLayoutSource: Base layout: public-domain Wikimedia dairy-stall plan
dashboard.noBarnDataYet: No live barn sensor data has arrived yet.

vetConnect.title: Veterinary Connect
vetConnect.subtitle: Request help, review veterinarian availability, and keep urgent herd questions moving.
vetConnect.loadError: Unable to load veterinarians right now.
vetConnect.defaultRequestDescription: Requesting a veterinary consultation from Veterinary Connect.

requestComposer.title: Ask a veterinarian
requestComposer.subtitle: Share the animal type, urgency, and field observations so a vet can triage faster.
requestComposer.symptomsPlaceholder: Example: Fever, low appetite, coughing, diarrhea, recent movement, or photo notes...
requestComposer.photoHint: Photo attachment placeholder for the next version.

vetConnect.availableSubtitle: Demo cards add region and response context around the existing veterinarian list.

emptyState.title: No veterinarians are listed yet
emptyState.description: You can still prepare a consult request so it is ready when the directory is available.

queue.title: Recent consult queue
queue.subtitle: Demo examples of how farm questions could be tracked.

biosecurity.title: ASF biosecurity check
biosecurity.description: Farmer asked whether to isolate a pen after nearby outbreak news.

vaccination.title: Vaccination schedule review
vaccination.description: Routine review requested before moving young livestock.

symptoms.title: Respiratory symptoms follow-up
symptoms.description: Coughing and low appetite case waiting for updated photos.

quiz.restrictedMessage: Your awareness score is low. Complete more quizzes to improve your score and regain full access to features.
quiz.passedMessage: You scored {{score}}% and earned a certificate for this quiz.
quiz.failedMessage: You scored {{score}}%. Review the notebook note and try again later to earn the certificate.
quiz.retryAdvice: If the score is below passing, consider reviewing the notebook note and taking a new quiz later.
quiz.completed: Quiz completed! Check your results above.
quiz.noQuizzesMessage: Please check back after the system seeds the quiz content.

profile.subtitle: View your achievement and certification status
profile.certificateDescription: Your certificate recognizes your exceptional commitment to herd health and farm management.
profile.keepLearningMessage: Complete more quizzes and improve your awareness score to unlock your certificate. Currently at {{score}}% - you're {{remaining}}% away from certification!

roadmap.title: Farmer learning path
roadmap.subtitle: Follow a practical route from herd health basics to disease response, daily operations, and certification readiness.

basics.title: Herd health basics
basics.description: Build the habit of checking daily herd condition, symptoms, and farm notes.

disease.title: Disease awareness
disease.description: Recognize warning signs, regional alerts, and when to contact veterinary support.

operations.title: Farm operations
operations.description: Connect learning with inventory, treatment records, and production reports.

certification.title: Certification readiness
certification.description: Review weak areas, pass quizzes consistently, and prepare for certificate unlock.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your Farm2Vets AI assistant. Ask me about your herd health, treatment plans, or disease alerts.
chat.suggestion1: What is the current herd health score?
chat.suggestion3: Any disease alerts I should know about?
chat.errorMessage: Unable to reach AI assistant. Please check your connection.

forum.title: Community Forum
forum.subtitle: Share local livestock updates, health observations, and practical advice with nearby farmers.
forum.regionalSearchSubtitle: Demo suggestions based on the most searched topics in your region.

tips.useHashtags: Use hashtags so nearby farmers can find your topic.
tips.reactHelpful: React to helpful updates to raise urgent posts.
tips.shareExperience: Share what worked on your farm, including dates and symptoms.
tips.askAdvice: Ask for advice early when symptoms change quickly.

forum.reportPrompt: Why are you reporting this post?
forum.shareExperiencePlaceholder: Share your field experience with the community...
forum.postContentPlaceholder: Describe what happened, what you observed, or what advice you need...

validation.titleContentRequired: Please enter a title and content.

asf.description: Farmers are checking outbreak risk and biosecurity steps.

lamDong.description: High regional interest after a reported disposal event.

avianFlu.description: Poultry farms are comparing prevention schedules.

vaccine.description: Cattle owners are searching symptom photos and vet advice.

livestock.subtitle: Manage animal profiles and basic herd records.

notebook.title: AI Herd Notebook
notebook.description: Record field notes and let AI turn critical observations into practical next steps.
notebook.addNoteSubtitle: Save a normal note or analyze it with AI for urgency, tags, and recommendations.
notebook.notePlaceholder: Describe symptoms, behavior changes, barn conditions, treatment notes, or anything important...
notebook.quizCreatedHint: Critical notes can generate awareness quizzes for follow-up learning.
notebook.criticalQuizGenerated: Critical note saved and a follow-up quiz was generated.
notebook.criticalQuizFailed: Critical note saved, but quiz generation failed.
notebook.aiSaveError: Unable to analyze and save note.
notebook.quizGenerateError: Unable to generate quiz from this note.

inventory.title: Inventory & Supplies
inventory.subtitle: Manage your farm's inventory and supplies
inventory.name: Name

analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.subtitle: Track production, sales, and farm profitability

landing.heroTitle: Your herd intelligence hub for proactive animal health.
landing.heroDescription: Farm2Vets blends AI-powered notebook workflows, live sensor analytics, and seamless vet collaboration into a premium interface built for trusted decisions.
landing.walkthroughSubtitle: A polished guide to start using the AI Herd Notebook instantly.
landing.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
landing.smartSummariesDescription: Instantly surface the top health signals and animal alerts.
landing.actionReadyAlertsDescription: See risk, treatment advice, and consultation triggers in one view.
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about the AI Herd Notebook and how it helps your farm.
landing.decisionTitle: Designed for modern farms, built to inspire confidence.
landing.decisionDescription: From real-time environmental intelligence to expert consultations, Farm2Vets brings the full livestock health workflow into one premium experience.
landing.aiSummary: Intelligent notebook summarization and alert prioritization.
landing.opsSummary: Live sensor telemetry and actionable barn insights.

feature1.title: AI-powered Herd Notebook
feature1.description: Capture every animal insight with smart notes, automated health flags, and action-ready recommendations.

feature2.title: Live Sensor Intelligence
feature2.description: Monitor barn conditions and disease risk in real time with sensor-driven alerts and precision analytics.

feature3.title: Veterinary Collaboration
feature3.description: Connect quickly with vets, schedule consults, and share actionable reports straight from the dashboard.

feature4.title: Risk Map & Forecasts
feature4.description: Visualize disease risk trends, heatmaps, and regional alerts to stay ahead of outbreaks.

faqs.question: How do I start using the AI Herd Notebook?
faqs.answer: Click Launch Notebook to open the notebook interface. Then add your herd details to begin tracking health events and alerts.

faqs.question: Can I switch between English and Vietnamese?
faqs.answer: Yes. Use the language switcher at the top of the page to toggle between EN and VI instantly.

faqs.question: What insights does the platform provide?
faqs.answer: Farm2Vets delivers automated health alerts, sensor analytics, risk heatmaps, and consult-ready reports for your livestock.

faqs.question: Is the walkthrough video available?
faqs.answer: Yes. The video placeholder shows the onboarding experience location, and it will be connected as a guided tutorial soon.
